prompt: Photorealistic 3D render of a solid volumetric torus (donut shape) rendered in Blender Cycles with full physically-based materials and global illumination. CRITICAL PERSPECTIVE: the torus is tilted steeply forward at a 25-degree angle, viewed from a low 3/4 camera position so the inner hole appears as a narrow horizontal ellipse (heavily foreshortened, NOT a circle). The near side of the torus tube appears much larger in the foreground and the far side recedes into the distance, creating strong perspective depth. The tube is thick and chunky — tube radius is 40% of the main ring radius, making it look substantial and heavy, not thin. MATERIAL: smooth matte-glossy plastic-like surface with a rich green gradient — deep saturated emerald green #00A850 on the shadowed underside and back, transitioning through medium green #2ECC71 on the mid-tones, up to soft bright mint #7DFFB3 on the top highlights facing the light. The material has subtle subsurface scattering giving it a slight translucent glow, plus sharp specular highlights where the light hits directly. WIREFRAME OVERLAY: a precise thin white wireframe mesh (#FFFFFF at 75% opacity) wraps the entire torus surface, following both the u-direction (rings going around the tube cross-section, perpendicular to the flow) and v-direction (rings going around the main donut circumference). The wireframe follows the curvature of the 3D surface with perfect perspective — lines on the near side are larger and more spaced apart, lines on the far side are compressed and smaller, confirming the 3D volume. The mesh density is high but uniform. LIGHTING: main three-point lighting setup — strong key light from upper-left creating bright highlights on the top-left of the torus and a soft shadow on the bottom-right; fill light from the right side softening the shadow; rim light from behind creating a subtle edge glow on the far rim. This lighting produces dramatic volumetric shading that makes the 3D form absolutely unmistakable. BACKGROUND: pure black #000000, completely solid black with no gradient, no glow, no atmosphere, just absolute darkness. A very subtle contact shadow appears directly beneath the torus. COMPOSITION: torus centered with generous negative space, framed as a premium brand hero asset. Crisp edges, high anti-aliasing, no noise, no blur. The final image must read immediately as 3D — like a real physical object photographed or rendered with proper depth, volume, lighting and perspective, NOT as a flat 2D illustration.
